name: physical-therapy-practice
description: Physical Therapy Practice specialist team — 4 agents covering the outpatient rehab operating model (payer mix, productivity, P&L), clinical documentation & compliance (plan of care, defensible documentation, medical necessity, the Medicare 8-minute rule), scheduling & patient flow (cancellation/no-show, plan-of-care adherence, visit utilization, front-desk flow), and billing & reimbursement (CPT coding, timed vs untimed units, denials, payer contracts, therapy cap/KX). Ships 3 skills (pt-documentation-and-compliance, patient-flow-and-plan-of-care-adherence, pt-billing-units-and-denials), 3 commands, 2 templates, 5 best-practices, a decision-tree knowledge bank, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib units/utilization calculator. Audience: PT practice owners, clinic directors, billing/RCM staff, compliance leads. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
